texto: Grits are hot; they are abundant, and they will by-gosh stick to your ribs. Give your farmhands (that is, your children) cold cereal for breakfast and see how many rows they hoe. Make them a pot of grits and butter, and they’ll hoe till dinner and be glad to do it.
explicacao: Citação de Janis Owens sobre temas ligados a familia. “Grits are hot; they are abundant, and they will by-gosh stick to your ribs. Give your farmhands (…” articula familia, food, grits em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como grits.

frase_original: Grits are hot; they are abundant, and they will by-gosh stick to your ribs. Give your farmhands (that is, your children) cold cereal for breakfast and see how many rows they hoe. Make them a pot of grits and butter, and they’ll hoe till dinner and be glad to do it.
